TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O lalengatan no namalÁÅ´Á®ÆËµ∑Ê∫ê O lalengatan no namal a tawcikel i tosaay ko sowal i 'Amis: 1,nani pinanowang ko sakaira no namal a sowal: Itiya ho awaay ko namal, cowa kacaloway ko ''orip no tamdaw. To cecay a romi'ad, mapolong ko niyaro'ay a mikilim to nanaml, tahira cangra i tongroh no tokos i, ma'araw nangra i raay ko tedi no namal, saka, papialaaen nangra ko pinanowang toya namal. O pakaalaay toya namal i, o mangcel ko pakaalaay saikor. Itiya ho, natayni i Taywan ko pawpaw no tapokpokan na Sera aci Nakaw i, toktokan naira ko po'ot to fakeloh, saka ira ko namal. Kaikor to i, malahedaway koya namal. O tamdaw han to i, papipaidesen naira ko pinanowang tayra Sanayasay a miala to nama. O sa'ayaway patatikol a miala to namal i, o malonem, kaorira i, tatahini i lawac no riyar ko rakat nira i, mapacepa' no nanom no riyar koya namal. Ikor no nini i, o ssiri ko patatikoray, mehecad to ko demak nira a mapacefos no nanam no riyar i katahiraan i lawac no riyar. Saikoray to i, o ngafol ko pakaalaay to namal, lalawolawod sa ko tamdaw a mipohpoh to tatirengan noya ngafol to hemak, mansa ya fanos no ngafol i, makapah a nengnengen, ora pipohpoh no tamdaw ko sakakapah no fanoh nira. 2 pa'isa'is a sinamal sanay a sowal Itiya ho, tayni i hekal ko kawas to cecay ko fa'inayan cecay ko fafahiyan. Malaolah kona kawas a tatosa, mafana' haca to no tamdaw a kararamo, mansa 'aloman ko wawawawa nangra. To cecay a romi'ad, matefing noya fafahiyan a kawas ko cecay ma'icangay a kasoy, ma'isa'is kora kasoy a sinamal, onini to ko sakaira no namal. Ikor to i, mararid a mafolaw ko mira, o saikoray to a kafolaw no mira i, oya Takidis hananay ko aro' naira itira, makapah to ko aro' no mira itira, cowa kanikaw to kakaenen to mihecahecaan. Macedas ko nanom no 'alo, malifowak ko faedetay a nanaom nanisera, lesen han nira ko niyaro', awa to ko ma'oripay. Itiya ira koya malikakaay mitifekay to lamelo itiya, ma'araw naira ko kacedas no nanom i, tangsol a miteroc tayra toya tatifekan a mapawpaw to. Saikor to ko rakat nora kapawpaw i, itiraay i tokos a mahicela. Maedeng to cecay to a lipay i, malahedaw to ko nanom, malikelon to ko mira pasayra i satimolan ko rakat a tayra i Naloma'an. Ona malikakaay i, raramod sato, tosa ko wawa naira, ya wawa naira i, mararamod kora malikakaay, 'aloman ko wawa naira, saka 'aloman sato ko teloc tahanini. Ya katahira naira i Naloma'an i, awa ko namal itiya, o 'oway ato kasoy ko sapi'isa'is a mikinamal, kaorira i, kalifotan. To cecay a romi'ad i, mirawod koya 'ayam Tatahciw. Saka papialaen naira koya 'ayam to namal. Pasayra i kawali ko Tatahciw a miala to namal, yo patatikol tatahira to i lawac no riyar i, matefad kora sinamalay a kasoy i riyar. Ikor to i, ma'araw ko roma a 'ayam, papialaen naira koya 'ayam to namal, kaorira mahecad to a maidah ko demak. Oya to a malikakaay i, ala sato to kohecalay a fakeloh mipatatekong a mikinamal, ona pikinaal a demak i, pakafana'en naira ko wawawawa ato fofofofo. O teloc naira I, ira ko mafolaway tayra i Pokpok, ira ko mafolaway tayra i Nataoran a malato'as to no itiraay a teloc. .
S.PHON: o~u …æa…æ…ô≈ãatan no~u nama…æ**** o~u …æa…æ…ô≈ãatan no~u nama…æ a taw ¶ik…ô…æ i to~usaaj ko~u so~uwa…æ i °amis: *,nani pinano~uwa≈ã ko~u sakaira no~u nama…æ a so~uwa…æ: itija ƒßo~u awaaj ko~u nama…æ, ¶o~uwa ka ¶a…æo~uwaj ko~u ° °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…Æaw. to~u ¶…ô ¶aj a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ, mapo~u…æo~u≈ã ko~u nijaro~u °aj a miki…æim to~u nanam…æ, taƒßira ¶a≈ãra i to~u≈ãro~uƒß no~u to~uko~us i, ma °araw na≈ãra i raaj ko~u t…ô…¨~…Æi no~u nama…æ, saka, papia…æaa…ôn na≈ãra ko~u pinano~uwa≈ã to~uja nama…æ. o~u pakaa…æaaj to~uja nama…æ i, o~u ma≈ã ¶…ô…æ ko~u pakaa…æaaj saiko~ur. itija ƒßo~u, natajni i tajwan ko~u pawpaw no~u tapo~ukpo~ukan na s…ôra a ¶i nakaw i, to~ukto~ukan naira ko~u po~u °o~ut to~u fak…ô…æo~uƒß, saka ira ko~u nama…æ. kaiko~ur to~u i, ma…æaƒß…ô…¨~…Æawaj ko~uja nama…æ. o~u tam…¨~…Æaw ƒßan to~u i, papipai…¨~…Æ…ôs…ôn naira ko~u pinano~uwa≈ã tajra sanajasaj a mia…æa to~u nama. o~u sa °ajawaj patatiko~u…æ a mia…æa to~u nama…æ i, o~u ma…æo~un…ôm, kao~urira i, tataƒßini i …æawa ¶ no~u rijar ko~u rakat nira i, mapa ¶…ôpa ° no~u nano~um no~u rijar ko~uja nama…æ. iko~ur no~u nini i, o~u ssiri ko~u patatiko~uraj, m…ôƒß…ô ¶a…¨~…Æ to~u ko~u …¨~…Æ…ômak nira a mapa ¶…ôfo~us no~u nanam no~u rijar i kataƒßiraan i …æawa ¶ no~u rijar. saiko~uraj to~u i, o~u ≈ãafo~u…æ ko~u pakaa…æaaj to~u nama…æ, …æa…æawo~u…æawo~u…¨~…Æ sa ko~u tam…¨~…Æaw a mipo~uƒßpo~uƒß to~u tatir…ô≈ãan no~uja ≈ãafo~u…æ to~u ƒß…ômak, mansa ja fano~us no~u ≈ãafo~u…æ i, makapaƒß a n…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã…ôn, o~ura pipo~uƒßpo~uƒß no~u tam…¨~…Æaw ko~u sakakapaƒß no~u fano~uƒß nira. * pa °isa °is a sinama…æ sanaj a so~uwa…æ itija ƒßo~u, tajni i ƒß…ôka…æ ko~u kawas to~u ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u fa °inajan ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u fafaƒßijan. ma…æao~u…æaƒß ko~una kawas a tato~usa, mafana ° ƒßa ¶a to~u no~u tam…¨~…Æaw a kararamo~u, mansa °a…æo~uman ko~u wawawawa na≈ãra. to~u ¶…ô ¶aj a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ, mat…ôfi≈ã no~uja fafaƒßijan a kawas ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ma °i ¶a≈ãaj a kaso~uj, ma °isa °is ko~ura kaso~uj a sinama…æ, o~unini to~u ko~u sakaira no~u nama…æ. iko~ur to~u i, marari…¨~…Æ a mafo~u…æaw ko~u mira, o~u saiko~uraj to~u a kafo~u…æaw no~u mira i, o~uja taki…¨~…Æis ƒßananaj ko~u aro~u ° naira itira, makapaƒß to~u ko~u aro~u ° no~u mira itira, ¶o~uwa kanikaw to~u kaka…ôn…ôn to~u miƒß…ô ¶aƒß…ô ¶aan. ma ¶…ô…¨~…Æas ko~u nano~um no~u °a…æo~u, ma…æifo~uwak ko~u fa…ô…¨~…Æ…ôtaj a nanao~um nanis…ôra, …æ…ôs…ôn ƒßan nira ko~u nijaro~u °, awa to~u ko~u ma °o~uripaj. itija ira ko~uja ma…æikakaaj mitif…ôkaj to~u …æam…ô…æo~u itija, ma °araw naira ko~u ka ¶…ô…¨~…Æas no~u nano~um i, ta≈ãso~u…æ a mit…ôro~u ¶ tajra to~uja tatif…ôkan a mapawpaw to~u. saiko~ur to~u ko~u rakat no~ura kapawpaw i, itiraaj i to~uko~us a maƒßi ¶…ô…æa. ma…ô…¨~…Æ…ô≈ã to~u ¶…ô ¶aj to~u a …æipaj i, ma…æaƒß…ô…¨~…Æaw to~u ko~u nano~um, ma…æik…ô…æo~un to~u ko~u mira pasajra i satimo~u…æan ko~u rakat a tajra i na…æo~uma °an. o~una ma…æikakaaj i, raramo~u…¨~…Æ sato~u, to~usa ko~u wawa naira, ja wawa naira i, mararamo~u…¨~…Æ ko~ura ma…æikakaaj, °a…æo~uman ko~u wawa naira, saka °a…æo~uman sato~u ko~u t…ô…æo~u ¶ taƒßanini. ja kataƒßira naira i na…æo~uma °an i, awa ko~u nama…æ itija, o~u °o~uwaj ato~u kaso~uj ko~u sapi °isa °is a mikinama…æ, kao~urira i, ka…æifo~utan. to~u ¶…ô ¶aj a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i, mirawo~u…¨~…Æ ko~uja °ajam tataƒß ¶iw. saka papia…æa…ôn naira ko~uja °ajam to~u nama…æ. pasajra i kawa…æi ko~u tataƒß ¶iw a mia…æa to~u nama…æ, jo~u patatiko~u…æ tataƒßira to~u i …æawa ¶ no~u rijar i, mat…ôfa…¨~…Æ ko~ura sinama…æaj a kaso~uj i rijar. iko~ur to~u i, ma °araw ko~u ro~uma a °ajam, papia…æa…ôn naira ko~uja °ajam to~u nama…æ, kao~urira maƒß…ô ¶a…¨~…Æ to~u a mai…¨~…Æaƒß ko~u …¨~…Æ…ômak. o~uja to~u a ma…æikakaaj i, a…æa sato~u to~u ko~uƒß…ô ¶a…æaj a fak…ô…æo~uƒß mipatat…ôko~u≈ã a mikinama…æ, o~una pikinaa…æ a …¨~…Æ…ômak i, pakafana °…ôn naira ko~u wawawawa ato~u fo~ufo~ufo~ufo~u. o~u t…ô…æo~u ¶ naira i, ira ko~u mafo~u…æawaj tajra i po~ukpo~uk, ira ko~u mafo~u…æawaj tajra i natao~uran a ma…æato~u °as to~u no~u itiraaj a t…ô…æo~u ¶. .
S.FORM: O lalengatan no namalÁÅ´Á®ÆËµ∑Ê∫ê O lalengatan no namal a tawcikel i tosaay ko sowal i 'Amis: 1,nani pinanowang ko sakaira no namal a sowal: Itiya ho awaay ko namal, cowa kacaloway ko ''orip no tamdaw. To cecay a romi'ad, mapolong ko niyaro'ay a mikilim to nanaml, tahira cangra i tongroh no tokos i, ma'araw nangra i raay ko tedi no namal, saka, papialaaen nangra ko pinanowang toya namal. O pakaalaay toya namal i, o mangcel ko pakaalaay saikor. Itiya ho, natayni i Taywan ko pawpaw no tapokpokan na Sera aci Nakaw i, toktokan naira ko po'ot to fakeloh, saka ira ko namal. Kaikor to i, malahedaway koya namal. O tamdaw han to i, papipaidesen naira ko pinanowang tayra Sanayasay a miala to nama. O sa'ayaway patatikol a miala to namal i, o malonem, kaorira i, tatahini i lawac no riyar ko rakat nira i, mapacepa' no nanom no riyar koya namal. Ikor no nini i, o ssiri ko patatikoray, mehecad to ko demak nira a mapacefos no nanam no riyar i katahiraan i lawac no riyar. Saikoray to i, o ngafol ko pakaalaay to namal, lalawolawod sa ko tamdaw a mipohpoh to tatirengan noya ngafol to hemak, mansa ya fanos no ngafol i, makapah a nengnengen, ora pipohpoh no tamdaw ko sakakapah no fanoh nira. 2 pa'isa'is a sinamal sanay a sowal Itiya ho, tayni i hekal ko kawas to cecay ko fa'inayan cecay ko fafahiyan. Malaolah kona kawas a tatosa, mafana' haca to no tamdaw a kararamo, mansa 'aloman ko wawawawa nangra. To cecay a romi'ad, matefing noya fafahiyan a kawas ko cecay ma'icangay a kasoy, ma'isa'is kora kasoy a sinamal, onini to ko sakaira no namal. Ikor to i, mararid a mafolaw ko mira, o saikoray to a kafolaw no mira i, oya Takidis hananay ko aro' naira itira, makapah to ko aro' no mira itira, cowa kanikaw to kakaenen to mihecahecaan. Macedas ko nanom no 'alo, malifowak ko faedetay a nanaom nanisera, lesen han nira ko niyaro', awa to ko ma'oripay. Itiya ira koya malikakaay mitifekay to lamelo itiya, ma'araw naira ko kacedas no nanom i, tangsol a miteroc tayra toya tatifekan a mapawpaw to. Saikor to ko rakat nora kapawpaw i, itiraay i tokos a mahicela. Maedeng to cecay to a lipay i, malahedaw to ko nanom, malikelon to ko mira pasayra i satimolan ko rakat a tayra i Naloma'an. Ona malikakaay i, raramod sato, tosa ko wawa naira, ya wawa naira i, mararamod kora malikakaay, 'aloman ko wawa naira, saka 'aloman sato ko teloc tahanini. Ya katahira naira i Naloma'an i, awa ko namal itiya, o 'oway ato kasoy ko sapi'isa'is a mikinamal, kaorira i, kalifotan. To cecay a romi'ad i, mirawod koya 'ayam Tatahciw. Saka papialaen naira koya 'ayam to namal. Pasayra i kawali ko Tatahciw a miala to namal, yo patatikol tatahira to i lawac no riyar i, matefad kora sinamalay a kasoy i riyar. Ikor to i, ma'araw ko roma a 'ayam, papialaen naira koya 'ayam to namal, kaorira mahecad to a maidah ko demak. Oya to a malikakaay i, ala sato to kohecalay a fakeloh mipatatekong a mikinamal, ona pikinaal a demak i, pakafana'en naira ko wawawawa ato fofofofo. O teloc naira I, ira ko mafolaway tayra i Pokpok, ira ko mafolaway tayra i Nataoran a malato'as to no itiraay a teloc. .

°ajam to~u nama…æ, kao~urira maƒß…ô ¶a…¨~…Æ to~u a mai…¨~…Æaƒß ko~u …¨~…Æ…ômak. o~uja to~u a ma…æikakaaj i, a…æa sato~u to~u ko~uƒß…ô ¶a…æaj a fak…ô…æo~uƒß mipatat…ôko~u≈ã a mikinama…æ, o~una pikinaa…æ a …¨~…Æ…ômak i, pakafana °…ôn naira ko~u wawawawa ato~u fo~ufo~ufo~ufo~u. o~u t…ô…æo~u ¶ naira i, ira ko~u mafo~u…æawaj tajra i po~ukpo~uk, ira ko~u mafo~u…æawaj tajra i natao~uran a ma…æato~u °as to~u no~u itiraaj a t…ô…æo~u ¶. .
